sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient has a sweet tooth. The patient reports weight gain. The patient experienced difficulty with their right foot.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has diabetes. Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Recommend increased oral hydration and slow positional changes. Follow up if symptoms worsen or do not improve. The patient is currently taking metformin.
